brand_dna.category: Decorative bath safety hardware - grab bars, shower seats, and ramps disguised as elegant bath accessories.
brand_dna.core_belief: Safety and beauty do not have to be mutually exclusive: bathing should be a safe, beautiful, and tranquil experience that preserves dignity and independence.
proof_points: ADA compliant grab bars with 1-1/4 inch diameter
LiveSafe Mounting System supports up to 500lbs in hollow wall or studs
Mount Daddy hollow wall fasteners and stud mount flanges included FREE in every box
Product design based on research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments
brand_dna.positioning: Premium and design-forward vs. institutional-looking medical grab bars - 'luxurious, yet affordable' safety that hides in plain sight.

voice_pillars.name: Dignity-First
voice_pillars.desc: Frames safety around preserving independence and dignity rather than framing customers as frail or sick.
voice_pillars.quote: prevent falls, preserve dignity, enhance home accessibility and promote independent living

voice_pillars.name: Beauty Meets Safety
voice_pillars.desc: Always pairs the safety benefit with style, insisting customers should not have to choose between the two.
voice_pillars.quote: Why choose between safety and style when you can have both?

voice_pillars.name: Research-Backed Confidence
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks with authority grounded in real end-user research and specific fall-risk knowledge.
voice_pillars.quote: We know the high risk fall zones in the bathroom, what causes people to fall

voice_pillars.name: Discreet Reassurance
voice_pillars.desc: Reassures buyers that safety can be hidden inside everyday accessories, removing the stigma of medical gear.
voice_pillars.quote: disguises grab bars as bath accessories, discretely providing the safety of grab bars

phrases: Why choose between safety and style when you can have both?
age in place with confidence and style
transforms your bathroom's most vulnerable moment into a confident, secure experience
the perfect blend of functionality and elegance
crucial support exactly when and where you need

icp: Adult children and caregivers of aging parents, plus seniors aging in place, who want fall protection in the bathroom without the clinical look and are willing to pay more for design and easy, secure installation.

personas.name: The Caring Adult Child
personas.description: A 45-65 year old arranging home safety for an aging parent, moved by dignity and 'preserve independence' messaging over medical-device framing.

personas.name: The Style-Conscious Ager
personas.description: A senior planning to age in place who refuses an institutional bathroom, moved by 'safety and style when you can have both.'

personas.name: The Reseller / Contractor
personas.description: A dealer or installer sourcing accessible-bath product, moved by free mounting hardware, 500lb load rating, and same-day-response service.

LiveWell Grabcessories™ Decorative 2-in-1 Tub/Shower Grab Bar Ring w/ Grips

LiveWell 16 inch ADA Compliant Grab Bar Standard Peened Grip 1 1/4 inch Diameter Model# LW-16x125-PN

offers: Free shipping on retail orders over $100
30-day return policy (unused, original packaging, proof of purchase)
Return shipping label provided on accepted returns
LiveSafe Mounting System and Mount Daddy fasteners included free in every box
Reseller and affiliate programs with large-quantity pricing

allowed.claim: ADA compliant grab bars with 1-1/4 inch diameter
Supports up to 500lbs in hollow wall substrates that support the weight load as well as in studs
LiveSafe Mounting System and Mount Daddy fasteners included free in every box
Free shipping on retail orders over $100
Designed from research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments

banned.claim: Prevents all falls or eliminates fall risk
banned.why: Unqualified absolute safety/health-outcome claim the product cannot guarantee - overstates a health/injury benefit.

banned.claim: Cures, treats, or heals mobility conditions or injuries
banned.why: Disease-treatment claim is prohibited; product is a safety aid, not a medical treatment.

banned.claim: Cite '60% of bathroom falls occur at the toilet' as a hard fact without a source
banned.why: Unsupported statistic - only use if a verifiable source is attached, otherwise it is a made-up number.
No certification or endorsement is stated on the site; would be an unsubstantiated authority claim.

banned.claim: Guarantees independence or that the user will never need help again
banned.why: Overstated outcome claim that cannot be substantiated for any individual.
